mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGE(ROOM_ID, SENDER, CONTENT, MESSAGE_TYPE) VALUES(#{roomId}, #{sender}, #{content}, #{messageType})
mapper.select:
SELECT ROOM_ID, SENDER, CONTENT, MESSAGE_TYPE FROM(
SELECT CHAT_ID, ROOM_ID, SENDER, CONTENT, MESSAGE_TYPE FROM CHAT_MESSAGE WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY CHAT_ID DESC LIMIT 50 ) recent ORDER BY CHAT_ID ASC
